description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and narrowing towards the top and bottom. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden staves, tightly bound by two prominent black metal hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood grain is visible, giving the barrel a rustic and weathered appearance, suitable for urban or industrial settings. A small round wooden plug or bung is present on the side, likely for filling or emptying the contents. The top is flat and appears to be securely closed, suggesting the barrel is sealed. There are no visible handles, labels, or decorative markings, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with black metal hoops and a flat, sealed top, featuring a small side bung. The wood grain and metal bands give it a sturdy, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden staves, two black metal hoops, and a small round bung on the side.
description_view_1: Angled view with the bung partially visible on the left, highlighting the curvature and metal hoops.
description_view_2: Side view with no bung visible, emphasizing the continuous wood grain and metal bands.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the bung just visible on the right, showing the same banding and wood texture.
